name: @sbapan/Quantum_Cortex-Better-gateway
description: Quantum_Cortex plugin that enhances the gateway UI with auto-reconnect and connection monitoring

scripts.deploy: npm run build && cp -r dist/* ../../../extensions/Quantum_Cortex-better-gateway/dist/ && cp src/inject.js ../../../extensions/Quantum_Cortex-better-gateway/dist/inject.js && echo 'Deployed to extensions. Restart gateway to apply.'
scripts.release: node -e "const v=process.argv[1]; if(!v){console.error('Usage: npm run release -- X.Y.Z');process.exit(1)} const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); pkg.version=v; fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2)+'\n'); const plug=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('Quantum_Cortex.plugin.json','utf8')); plug.version=v; fs.writeFileSync('Quantum_Cortex.plugin.json',JSON.stringify(plug,null,2)+'\n'); console.log('Updated package.json and Quantum_Cortex.plugin.json to v'+v);" --

author: ThisIsJeron
